publishedAbstract: A backingstore was not in use. No OBC or bucketclass and a user desired to delete it. Upon deletion, both in the OCP Console GUI and the NooBaa CLI, the deletion failed with the following message: ~~~ FATA[0000] ❌ Could not delete BackingStore "noobaa-pv-backing-store" in namespace "openshift-storage" as it is the default resource of one or more accounts ~~~
publishedTitle: NooBaa BackingStore will not Delete "as it is the default resource of one or more accounts"
